repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_iv_v1: finite LP envelope / critical-radius pattern for continuous-dose partial ID; pid_did_anticipation_bounded_v1: support-function interval for a DiD nuisance polytope

published_prior_art.cite: CallawayGoodmanBaconSantAnna2021 supplies continuous-treatment DiD ACRT inputs and exposed cross-dose selection terms; ManskiPepper2000 and Voronin2025 supply shape/LP templates but not this ACRT nuisance array

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape_v1: finite-grid shape envelope plus warning that algebraic continuous-dose bounds may fail law-level pasting
pid_dose_response_iv_v1: critical-radius pattern; q_lpdid_bjs_frontier_v1: finite frontier diagnostic pattern

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013 and Stoye2020 cover optimized bounds and scalar interval inference, not this inverse ACRT sign-sensitivity LP
KaidoMolinariStoye2019, BelloniBugniChernozhukov2018, Stoye2020, and Voronin2025 provide adjacent relaxed projection / many-inequality / never-empty / LP-value inference machinery

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The theorem is only the algebraic envelope after the CGS diagonal inputs and cross-dose regularity convention are fixed; it is not a law-sharp causal interval by itself.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Field-tier algebraic PartialID envelope conditional on Assumptions 1--4, with causal sharpness deferred to Conjecture 1.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Finite latent-law completion is assumed open and not proved in the proposal.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Causal sharpness is conditional on a successful finite bounded latent-completion construction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Active-basis bookkeeping for L_h^star is open, and infeasible zero-contact cases remain under the setup convention L_h^star=+infty.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Critical-frontier claim is conditional on the finite-grid parametric-LP active-set analysis.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 3
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Inference is pointwise and not uniform over all laws; active-face/contact cases are narrowed by Assumption 7.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Endpoint and threshold inference claim is pointwise under the stated LP regularity and critical-contact taxonomy.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a worked three-dose Lipschitz LP transcript that computes L_h^star from concrete CGS inputs, including the active basis and the zero-containment certificate.

Add location anchors for the CGS ACRT/cross-dose selection decomposition and for the closest LP-value and projection-inference results, so the literature comparison is equation- or section-level rather than bibkey-level.

For Conjecture 1, either give the first explicit latent-completion construction route or state the smallest obstruction class where an algebraic ATT array may fail to paste into one bounded potential-outcome law.
Sharpen Conjecture 3 by writing the relaxed LP constraints and the limiting Gaussian program for one endpoint before treating the threshold L_h^star.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with field-tier framing, keeping the algebraic-vs-law-sharp caveat binding.
